H2: Rounded Corner Labels FAQs ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Rounded Corner Labels

Professional Vinyl Labels with Soft, Rounded Edges

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Size Options Material Type Quantity Upload Design File Cut Options Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Design Your Custom Rounded Corner Labels

Create professional rounded corner labels with a soft, polished appearance that stands out from traditional sharp-edged designs. Our custom rounded corner labels feature smooth, curved edges that provide an elegant finish for branding, product identification, and organizational needs. These durable vinyl labels combine the functionality of traditional labels with an enhanced aesthetic appeal that works perfectly for business applications, retail products, and personal projects. See also [rectangle label sheets](https://www.decals.com/labels/label-sheets/rectangle-label-sheets).

Choose from multiple customization options including various sizes, materials, and cutting methods to create rounded corner labels that meet your specific requirements. Our high-quality printing process ensures vibrant colors and sharp detail reproduction, while the rounded edges provide a premium look that enhances your brand presentation. Whether you need clear stickers for a subtle application or bold colored designs, our rounded corner labels deliver professional results.

Upload your own artwork or logo to create unique rounded corner labels that reflect your brand identity. Our online design system accommodates various file formats and provides proof approval to ensure your labels meet expectations before production begins.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Rounded Corner Label Order Process

Our streamlined ordering system makes it easy to create and order custom rounded corner labels. Start by selecting your preferred size, material, and quantity options using our online configurator. Upload your design file or use our online design tools to create artwork that showcases your brand with rounded corner styling.

Design Process

Choose from two design methods when creating your rounded corner labels. Use our online designer to build your labels from scratch by uploading images, adding text, and selecting from our clipart library. Alternatively, upload a print-ready file in vector format for the highest quality reproduction. Our system accepts various file formats and guides you through the design process to ensure optimal results.

Payment

All rounded corner labels require payment before production begins. We accept major credit cards including Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover. Check payments are also accepted and must be received before your labels enter production. Once payment is processed, your order moves into our production queue.

Live Order Tracking

Track your rounded corner labels through every stage of production and shipping with our Live Order Tracking system. After placing your order, you'll receive a unique tracking number via email that provides real-time updates from order placement through delivery. This system allows you to monitor progress and plan for your labels' arrival.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Production & Turnaround Times for Rounded Corner Labels

Our flexible production schedule offers multiple turnaround options to meet your timeline requirements. Production time begins after file approval and payment processing, allowing you to choose the speed that best fits your project needs.

1 Business Day Priority Production

Fast-track your rounded corner labels with our one-day priority option. Orders approved before 5:00 PM CST process the same business day, while orders approved after this time begin production the following business day. Emergency same-day production may be available in special circumstances - contact our customer service team for availability.

2 Business Days Express Production

Express production provides a balance of speed and efficiency for rounded corner labels. This option works well when you need quick turnaround but have slightly more flexibility than priority production allows.

3 Business Days Standard Production

Our standard production timeline offers reliable processing for rounded corner labels without rush fees. This timeframe accommodates thorough quality control while maintaining efficient production flow.

5 Business Days Saver Production

Choose saver production when your rounded corner labels don't require immediate delivery. This extended timeframe often provides cost savings while ensuring the same quality standards as faster production options.

Remember that production time is separate from shipping time. Your total delivery timeline includes both production days and shipping transit time to your location.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Die-Cut vs Kiss-Cut Rounded Corner Labels

Choose between two cutting methods that affect how your rounded corner labels separate from their backing material. Each cutting option provides different handling characteristics and application methods to suit various use cases and preferences.

Die-Cut Rounded Corner Labels

Die-cutting cuts completely through both the vinyl label material and paper backing, creating individually separated rounded corner labels with no excess material. This cutting method works like a cookie cutter, producing labels that are ready to peel and apply directly. Die-cut rounded corner labels arrive as individual pieces without paper borders, making them ideal for quick application and storage efficiency.

This option works best when you need labels that are easy to handle individually and don't require the stability of surrounding backing material. Back slit (crack and peel) functionality is available on standard and permanent material options for even easier application.

Kiss-Cut Rounded Corner Labels

Kiss-cutting cuts only through the vinyl layer while leaving the paper backing intact, creating rounded corner labels with paper material borders around each label. This method provides extra material around your labels for easy peeling and precise placement during application.

Kiss-cut rounded corner labels remain attached to their backing sheet until you peel them off, which helps with organization and provides stability during handling. The paper border makes it easier to position labels accurately before final application.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Rounded Corner Label Artwork Requirements

Proper file preparation ensures your rounded corner labels print with optimal quality and accurate color reproduction. Follow our artwork specifications to achieve professional results that showcase your design with crisp detail and vibrant colors.

Preferred File Types

Submit vector-based files for the highest quality rounded corner labels. Adobe Illustrator EPS (Encapsulated Post Script) and PDF formats provide the best results for text and graphics that remain sharp at any size. Convert all fonts to outlines or curves before submission to prevent font substitution issues. Maximum file size is 100 MB.

Additional File Formats

Raster files are accepted when vector formats aren't available. Submit JPG, TIFF, or PNG files at high resolution with proper scaling. Use 100% scale at 100 DPI, 50% scale at 200+ DPI, 25% scale at 300+ DPI, or 10% scale at 600-1200 DPI for optimal results.

File Setup Guidelines

Set up your artwork proportionate to your ordered rounded corner label size. Convert all text to outlines to maintain font integrity. Include bleed only when necessary and indicate cut lines clearly for proper production. Avoid flattening or merging layers in PSD files to maintain editing flexibility.

Design Services

Professional design assistance is available if you need help creating artwork for your rounded corner labels. Our vectorizing service can recreate logos and images starting at $15, with complex designs quoted individually. This service requires advance payment and includes file storage for future orders. Contact our team at (320) 391-5250 for design consultation.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Your Rounded Corner Labels

Your completed rounded corner labels ship within 2-4 business days after production to most United States locations. Standard shipping uses UPS Ground unless you specify alternative shipping methods during ordering. You'll receive tracking information once your package ships for delivery monitoring.

Shipping Methods

Multiple shipping speeds accommodate different delivery needs for your rounded corner labels. Choose from Economy (5-15 days), Standard (3-5 business days), Three Day (3 business days), Two Day (2 business days), or Overnight (1 business day) options. Economy shipping may add 5-10 additional days depending on destination location.

Shipping Time Expectations

Remember that shipping time is separate from production time when planning your rounded corner labels delivery. Your total timeline includes production days plus transit time to your location. Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5250 before ordering if you have questions about shipping rates or rush production options.

Important Shipping Notes

Economy shipping requires complete address information including P.O. Box details in the "Address Two" field during checkout. International shipments require customer-provided shipping labels and customs documentation. We accept international labels from USPS and UPS carriers only. Bulk order stickers may have different shipping considerations based on quantity and weight.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

How to Apply Rounded Corner Labels

Proper application ensures your rounded corner labels adhere securely and maintain their professional appearance over time. Follow these installation steps for best results on various surfaces and conditions.

Preparing the Surface

Clean the application surface thoroughly before applying rounded corner labels. Remove dirt, grease, and residue using appropriate cleaners for the surface material. Allow surfaces to dry completely before label application. Smooth, non-porous surfaces provide the best adhesion for rounded corner labels.

Applying Rounded Corner Labels

Peel labels carefully from their backing material, starting at one corner. Position the rounded corner label on your target surface and press firmly from the center outward to eliminate air bubbles. The rounded edges make positioning easier and reduce the risk of corner lifting that can occur with sharp-edged labels.

Finishing Application

Apply consistent pressure across the entire rounded corner label surface to ensure complete adhesion. Pay special attention to the rounded edges to secure proper bonding. Allow labels to set for several hours before exposing them to moisture or extreme temperatures for optimal performance.

For best results, apply rounded corner labels at room temperature and avoid application in direct sunlight or high humidity conditions. The vinyl material and adhesive perform optimally under normal environmental conditions.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are Rounded Corner Labels?

Rounded corner labels are adhesive vinyl labels featuring curved edges instead of sharp corners, providing a softer, more polished appearance than traditional rectangular labels. These labels are made from durable vinyl material with permanent or removable adhesive backing, depending on the intended application. Common uses include product branding, equipment identification, inventory management, and decorative applications where a refined appearance is desired. Rounded corner labels apply easily to most smooth surfaces and can be customized with any design, logo, or text to meet specific branding or organizational needs.

Order Custom Rounded Corner Labels Today

Create professional rounded corner labels that enhance your brand presentation with our easy online ordering system. Choose from multiple sizes, materials, and production timelines to meet your specific requirements. Our high-quality vinyl construction and precision cutting ensure your rounded corner labels deliver lasting performance and visual appeal.

Upload your artwork or design labels from scratch using our online tools. With fast production times, reliable shipping, and comprehensive customer support, we make it simple to get the custom rounded corner labels you need. Our domed decals offer another premium option for applications requiring enhanced durability and dimensional appearance.

Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5250 with questions about rounded corner label customization, bulk pricing, or rush production options. We're here to help you create labels that perfectly represent your brand and meet your application requirements.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Rounded Corner Labels FAQs

What materials are used to make rounded corner labels?

Rounded corner labels are made from high-quality vinyl material that provides durability and weather resistance. The vinyl construction allows for vibrant color reproduction and maintains its appearance over time when applied to appropriate surfaces.

How small or large can rounded corner labels be made?

Rounded corner labels can be produced in various sizes to accommodate different applications. Contact our customer service team to discuss specific size requirements and ensure your desired dimensions work with our production capabilities and maintain the rounded corner aesthetic.

What surfaces work best for rounded corner labels?

Rounded corner labels adhere best to smooth, clean, non-porous surfaces such as glass, metal, plastic, and painted surfaces. The curved edges reduce the likelihood of corner lifting that can occur with traditional sharp-edged labels on textured surfaces.

Do rounded corner labels have glossy or matte finishes available?

Rounded corner labels are available in different finish options depending on your aesthetic preferences and application requirements. The finish affects both the appearance and durability characteristics of your labels.

What's the difference between die-cut and kiss-cut rounded corner labels?

Die-cut rounded corner labels are individually separated with no backing material borders, while kiss-cut labels remain on backing sheets with paper borders around each label. Die-cut labels offer easier individual handling, while kiss-cut labels provide more control during application.

Can I get samples of rounded corner labels before placing a large order?

Sample options may be available to help you evaluate material quality and appearance before committing to larger quantities. Contact our team at (320) 391-5250 to discuss sample availability for your specific rounded corner label requirements.

How long do rounded corner labels last when applied outdoors?

The outdoor durability of rounded corner labels depends on the specific vinyl material, environmental conditions, and surface preparation. Properly applied labels on suitable surfaces typically maintain their appearance and adhesion for several years under normal outdoor exposure.
